channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: F1 focus shifts in Qatar as McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull fight for constructors' title
item.description: LUSAIL, Qatar (AP) — Max Verstappen won big in Las Vegas with his fourth world title, but the fight for Formula 1's biggest cash prize is hotting up this week in Qatar. The lucrative constructors' championship is still wide open with McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull battling for the title.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH1, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mailbag: Why the CFP rankings could prompt major changes, a Pac-12 title game, future USC-Stanford matchups and more
item.description: The committee's weekly rankings and comments suggest a devaluing of schedule strength, which is the SEC's calling card.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus with free-falling team last in NFC North
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss to Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Missing ingredient: Horns and Aggies renew storied and bitter rivalry after more than a decade
item.description: COLLEGE STATION, Texas (AP) — Ricky Williams won the Heisman Trophy and set the NCAA’s all-time rushing record during an illustrious career with the Texas Longhorns. Another highlight? Getting three wins over Texas A&M in four seasons.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN and JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College sports reform could advance in GOP-controlled Congress, with Sen. Ted Cruz as NCAA ally
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The NCAA's yearslong efforts to get lawmakers to address myriad problems in college sports could finally pay off in the new, Republican-controlled Congress. Sen.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oakland youth football team raises funds for national championship trip
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the Bay Area's top youth football programs has qualified for the 2024 Pop Warner Championship. However, the East Bay Warriors 13U team will need the community's support to help get them there.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lions extend win streak to 10 games, hold off Bears for 23-20 victory
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions have been dominant for much of the season, leading the league in point differential after routinely routing opponents. Against Chicago, the Lions were good enough to extend their winning streak to 10 games. Barely.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Battle, former Tennessee coach and Alabama AD who founded licensing company, dies
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Bill Battle III, who was athletic director at his alma mater, Alabama, where he played for Paul “Bear” Bryant's first national championship team, then later coached the Tennessee Volunteers and founded the Collegiate Licensing Company, has died. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions make franchise history moving to 11-1 after staving off Bears on Thanksgiving
item.description: The Detroit Lions on Thursday staved off a second-half push by the Chicago Bears to move to 11-1 on the year — the first time in franchise history they've started a season like this.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sports columnist claims ‘cisgender women’ are the ‘real threat’ in SJSU trans controversy
item.description: With San Jose State's women's volleyball team in the Mountain West final amid forfeits, a USA Today columnist says those refusing to play SJSU are the "real threat.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Missouri star basketball player stretchered off court in scary moment
item.description: Caleb Grill, the Missouri Tigers' leading scorer so far this season, was stretchered off the court on Wednesday night after an awkward head/neck injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SJSU going to Mountain West volleyball final as Boise State forfeits semifinals amid trans player controversy
item.description: Boise State women's volleyball is forfeiting its semifinal match to SJSU in the Mountain West tournament, giving trans athlete Blaire Fleming and the Spartans a free pass to the finals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani seeks $325,000 worth of baseball cards from his ex-interpreter
item.description: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani wants his former interpreter to hand over hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of baseball cards he says were fraudulently bought using his money.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn’t attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SEC fines University of Oklahoma $200,000 after fans rush onto field
item.description: The University of Oklahoma was fined $200,000 after the fans rushed the field during Saturday's game against Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Brown / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Family mourns death of 27-year-old woman in Harvey train crash
item.description: A 27-year-old woman was killed in a car versus train crash in Harvey, IL, leaving behind a family grieving for her loss.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Medina, WGN 9

item.title: Lightning host Avalanche for 'Hockey Fights Cancer' night
item.description: Although it's just another hockey game on the schedule for the lightning, tonight is bigger than that and means more than just the sport.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Lobos linemen purchase turkeys for families in need with NIL funds
item.description: Some of the players know how hard it can be to put food on the table, so they wanted to extend a hand up.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Torres, NewsNation

item.title: Special teams miscues prove costly for Bears in overtime loss to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Cairo Santos had a field goal blocked — again. DeAndre Carter muffed a punt in the second half. And those were just the special teams mistakes for the struggling Chicago Bears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Vikings: What you need to know for Sunday's NFC North showdown at Soldier Field
item.description: CHICAGO — To paraphrase the famous words of then-Indianapolis Colts head coach Jim Mora, the Bears aren't really in a position to think playoffs right now. They're just hoping they can win a game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Argentina's Racing wins its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1
item.description: Gaston Martirena and Adrian Martinez scored first-half goals as Argentina's Racing won its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1 in the final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5
